description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named .NET Core that runs on push events across multiple jobs on different operating systems. For each job on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest, set up .NET 5.0.x, 6.0.x, and 7.x SDKs, check out the repository, install required dependencies like libgdiplus and libjpeg62, restore, build, and test the project with .NET 6.0.x and 7.0.x.
